title: Reiquarium question
wikitext:
[]: Reiquarium question             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 06, 2008 6:24 pm Its explained that a soul is needed to form an at field which in turn holds a person body together, but what about the Rei's in the reiquarium? Ritsuko calls them soul-less dolls/spare parts so what is helping them keep Rei's shape? With no souls they should revert back to lcl, which I'm guessing is what happens when Ritsuko pulls the switch on them. But what is it that she turned off?

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Oct 06, 2008 6:31 pm OH SHI- Hrm, that is to say [/imitation of That Guy with the Glasses]That's a very good question.[/imitation]

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 06, 2008 7:33 pm Do a search for "destrudo release".

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Oct 06, 2008 10:31 pm They're just lifeless flesh until a soul is in them, and you can't clone a soul. As for why things don't just pop into LCL; yeah I think part of the thing Ritsuko turned OFF was the means by which they artificially held them together in the lab.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 06, 2008 10:43 pm thats the point of my question V, they're said to be soulless so whats keeping them together? and what is it that Ritsuko does that makes them deteriorate? From what i got from the destrudo thread, it was concluded that death energy was injected into the tank? (lolwut?) That Still doesnt explain what kept them "Alive." Someone posted in the thread that they must have some sort of soul but Ritsuko clearly calls them soul-less so that doesnt really make sense

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Mon Oct 06, 2008 10:58 pm We'll stick to soul-less like Ritsuko nicely pointed out and work from there. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 06, 2008 11:09 pm Hint: Lilith didn't have a soul and she was able to keep her shape on the cross just fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Oct 06, 2008 11:32 pm or maybe she had half a soul and Rei had the other half as Asuka's mom proved that a soul could be fragmented she would have to as its stated that its the at field which holds a beings shape, and a soul is needed for an at field

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Oct 07, 2008 12:26 am Axell, take a look at this thread . Stuff about destrudo and Rei clones and ATFs and blah blah blah can be found starting on that page. Pretty much all of this stuff got discussed really recently, so if you can get your questions answered from preexisting threads, that would be better than reiterating the discussions.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Oct 07, 2008 12:42 am sorry about that then didnt find that before since i had such a particular question, thank you to think i had forgotten Rei was "special" silly me
